did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper developed a segmentation system using traditional image processing techniques (thresholding and morphological operations) implemented in MATLAB, not AI, machine learning, or deep learning. The authors explicitly state the system uses 'simple and explainable techniques' and note that while AI techniques like CNNs exist, this specific work focuses on non-AI computational methods.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
